prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion model. Historical daily log returns for TMO over the past 5 years were analyzed. The calculated mean daily log return (drift) is approximately 0.000676, and the daily volatility (standard deviation of log returns) is approximately 0.0125. The point estimate represents the median of the projected log-normal distribution for the price in 22 trading days. Confidence intervals are derived from the same log-normal distribution, reflecting the inherent uncertainty based on historical volatility over the specified forecast horizon.
